title: Skill Definition
description: Defines a character skill that can be trained and levelled up.

id.description: Unique skill identifier following the pattern skill_<category>_<name>.

category.description: Skill tree this skill belongs to.

max_level.description: Maximum achievable level for this skill.

description.description: Flavour text shown in the skill tree UI.

level.description: Minimum level required in the prerequisite skill.

prerequisites.description: Skills that must be trained before this one can be unlocked.

stat.description: The stat affected by this skill.

per_level.description: Whether the modifier scales with each level.

effects.description: Stat modifiers granted by this skill.

unlock_cost_base.description: Base XP cost to unlock level 1; subsequent levels scale from this.

tags.description: Freeform tags for filtering and scripting.
